title: Is it just me or did they really mess up Reis eye here
display_title: Is it just me or did they really mess up Reis eye here
wikitext:
[]: Is it just me, or did they really mess up Rei's eye here?             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed May 30, 2007 7:31 pm Well, I hope this hasn't been discussed before. Doing a search for "Rei eye" isn't very helpful, as it shows pretty much EVERY THREAD EVER. In any case, take a look at this picture: Yeah, I've seen EoE how many times now?... and yet I've never noticed this until just now. I guess I always just looked at the whole picture whenever I watched it before, and not the smaller details... but, in any case, LOOK AT Rei'S FREAKING EYES!!! Did whoever drew that picture draw one of the worst mess-ups in the history of still frames that are held on screen for over one second, or was it intentional? Considering that I'd think someone would have caught it during the process of drawing, tracing, coloring and test screening, I'm inclined to believe it's intentional. But GOOD GOD, man! If it IS intentional, what sort of significance could distorting Rei's right eye so that it's entirely under her hair shadow possibly have?!

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Wed May 30, 2007 7:34 pm Yes, it looks like they screwed up.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed May 30, 2007 7:40 pm The only possible explanation in which this is not a fcuk-up is this was part of that weird underwater, ahem, underLCL rather scene/sequence post-3I and the liquid body created a wavy-looking reflection.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed May 30, 2007 7:43 pm Waaaaiiiit... NEVER MIND! It wasn't a mess-up. In fact, I'm pretty sure that it was showing that the image was being distorted three-dimensionally over the benches, as seen in this later image that I didn't bother to see before posting. Though, if it is truly being distorted over a surface, why not over Shinji?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed May 30, 2007 7:46 pm Edit: I was just about to post that SS and the previous one with Misato's mouth getting distorted. Perhaps these projections are part of his mind, and in his mind's eye, they wouldn't be projected onto him.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed May 30, 2007 7:48 pm I think either the camera's starting to focus in on Shinji through a scene change, as part the mindfcuk experience/"ambiance" or it was an error.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed May 30, 2007 7:59 pm THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: I think either the camera's starting to focus in on Shinji through a scene change, as part the mindfcuk experience/"ambiance" or it was an error.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed May 30, 2007 8:05 pm Ornette wrote: No, it's a static shot, no LCL or ripples, as if there's a slide projector above Shinji showing these images and leaving them on for a few seconds before showing the next.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Wed May 30, 2007 8:46 pm It simply looks like a gaff by the animator, from what I could tell.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed May 30, 2007 9:38 pm I get the feeling these "errors" were intentional. LOL MIND-FUCK Pre-Instrumentality and all. Edit: Am I the only one who thinks Misato looks rather cute in the second shot posted? Where she's blushing and her arms crossed over her chest? Asuka looks cute in the first and second ones, too. ^^;

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Wed May 30, 2007 9:40 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: I get the feeling these "errors" were intentional. LOL MIND-FUCK Pre-Instrumentality and all. Edit: Am I the only one who thinks Misato looks rather cute in the second shot posted? Where she's blushing and her arms crossed over her chest? Asuka looks cute in the first and second ones, too. ^^;

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed May 30, 2007 9:41 pm Executor wrote: It simply looks like a gaff by the animator, from what I could tell.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed May 30, 2007 9:44 pm Hmmm....these "benches" aren't by any chance that swing motif we kept seeing (animated and live-action thruout EoE) is it? Just a thought. *shrugs*

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Wed May 30, 2007 11:29 pm Stardust-chan wrote: Edit: Am I the only one who thinks Misato looks rather cute in the second shot posted? Where she's blushing and her arms crossed over her chest? Asuka looks cute in the first and second ones, too. ^^;

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Wed May 30, 2007 11:47 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Hmmm....these "benches" aren't by any chance that swing motif we kept seeing (animated and live-action thruout EoE) is it?

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Thu May 31, 2007 3:05 am THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: IMO, these benches remind me more of that train motif actually.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Thu May 31, 2007 10:49 am I stand corected then.

[]:             Quote Post by Magami no D00M » Sun Jun 03, 2007 12:36 am CorporalChaos wrote: THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: IMO, these benches remind me more of that train motif actually.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Mon Jun 11, 2007 4:25 am Actually, now that I look at it, the benches look like they are towering over Shinji. Perhaps his train of thought (which is what I always refer to this setting as) is starting to run out of his control and he finds himself trapped and has to go along for the ride?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Jun 11, 2007 12:26 pm CorporalChaos wrote: Actually, now that I look at it, the benches look like they are towering over Shinji. Perhaps his train of thought (which is what I always refer to this setting as) is starting to run out of his control and he finds himself trapped and has to go along for the ride?
